verdict: INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_PENDING — insufficient observations after listwise deletion (13)
falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is falsified if any of the following hold over 2008-2020 across the four institutions: (a) cumulative core-CPI divergence from each institution's pre-2008 5y trend exceeds 2 percentage points in any 6-month window in any of the four economies, (b) inflation-expectations 5y5y forward exits the pre-2008 anchored range (defined as ±0.75 pp around the pre-2008 mean) in any of the four jurisdictions, OR (c) panel Granger causality from balance-sheet to CPI rejects null at p<0.01 with positive coefficient at h=12-36 months after controlling for output gap and oil prices.

variables_loaded.name: central_bank_balance_sheet_pct_gdp
